title: EvalEngine Configuration
description: YAML configuration schema for evalengine — CEL-based evaluation rules with dependency resolution.

evaluation.description: A single evaluator that compiles a CEL expression and produces a boolean result.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this evaluator checks.

expression.description: CEL expression that must return a boolean. Access proto fields via 'input.<field>' and upstream evaluator results by their writes name.

reads.description: Dependencies — 'input.<field>' for proto fields or bare names for upstream evaluator outputs. Fully optional: auto-derived from the CEL AST.

writes.description: Output name — used as the result key, CEL variable for downstream evaluators, and graph node name. Must be unique across all evaluations.

resolution_workflow.description: Workflow ID to trigger when this evaluator fails.

resolution.description: Human-readable description of how to resolve a failure.

severity.description: Severity level (e.g. 'blocking'). Passed through to Result.

category.description: Grouping category. Passed through to Result.

failure_mode.description: Opaque failure mode string (e.g. 'soft', 'hard'). Passed through to Result.

preconditions.description: Guards that must all return true before the main expression runs. Failures produce a Pending result instead of Failed.

cache_ttl.description: Go duration string (e.g. '10m', '1h30s'). When set, cached results within this TTL are reused.

precondition.description: A CEL boolean guard evaluated before the main expression.

expression.description: CEL expression that must return true for the main expression to run.

description.description: Human-readable description shown when this precondition fails.
